title: Schizobasis schizobasoides
taxonomy: Schizobasis schizobasoides is a species of plant in the family Juncaginaceae. This family is commonly known as the flowering rush family. Juncaginaceae is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in wetland environments. They are characterized by their small flowers and grass-like appearance. Schizobasis schizobasoides is often found in the coastal regions of southern Africa.
